name: compress-shader-literals
description: Minify GLSL/WGSL shaders in your JS/TS at build time. Drop-in plugin for Vite, Rollup, webpack, esbuild, Rspack, Rolldown & Farm.
author: jayF0x

scripts.build_old: bun build src/plugin.js --outdir dist --entry-naming index.js --target node --format esm --external @babel/parser --external @babel/traverse --external @rollup/pluginutils --external byte-snap --external magic-string --external unplugin && cp src/index.d.ts dist/index.d.ts && bun build src/plugin.js --outdir dist --entry-naming index.cjs --target node --format cjs --external @babel/parser --external @babel/traverse --external @rollup/pluginutils --external byte-snap --external magic-string --external unplugin
scripts.test:validate: cd tests && bun install && node validate.js
scripts.test:e2e: cd tests && bun install && node e2e.js
scripts.test:dump: cd tests && bun install && node dump-chunks.js
scripts.tests:next: cd tests && bun install && node experimental.js
scripts.rm:stalepr: git branch -vv | grep '\[gone\]' | awk '{print $1}' | xargs git branch -D
